name: Barr. Adeoye Tomide
bio: Dedicated to bridging the gap between legacy legal practices and state-of-the-art technology. Specializing in automated compliance, smart contract architecture, and distributed legal systems.
achievements: Architected the 2026 Legal Engineering Framework for West Africa.
Lead Strategic Advisor for Orion Horizon Enterprises.

name: Dr. Phaseelah Ransome-Kuti
bio: Expert in navigating complex heritage and cultural legalities across West Africa, with a focus on strategic institutional communication.
achievements: Secured heritage protection status for 40+ historical sites.
Lead negotiator for the Pan-African Cultural Preservation Council.

name: Oladayo Williams
bio: Specializing in multi-jurisdictional energy transactions and infrastructure development across the emerging markets of Sub-Saharan Africa.
achievements: Senior Energy Policy Advisor to three West African governments.
